==Biography==
===2016 Preseason===
Kim "'''Crush'''" Jun-seo joined [[e-mFire]] as a jungler on January 5, 2016. In February, the team found a new title sponsor in Kongdoo and renamed to [[Kongdoo Monster]].
===2016 Season===
During the [[LCK/2016 Season/Spring Season|2016 LCK Spring Season]], Kongdoo Monster went 1-17 in sets, ending in last place. This forced them to play a relegation match against challenger team [[MVP]], who defeated them 3-1 and relegating them to [[Challengers Korea/2016 Season/Summer Season|Challengers Korea 2016 Summer]].
